user_prompt: Critical: star chart requires a loading
prayer:
Approach the star chart with reverence, intoning the Canticle of Celestial Alignment.
Invoke the Omnissiah's grace upon the star chart as loading commences upon its sacred matrices.
Anoint the stellar projectors with blessed unguents during the influx of astral data.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the star chart to harmonize the loading sequences.
Verify celestial coherence through auspex-liturgies of verification.

user_prompt: The battery array awaits a consecration
prayer:
Gather before the battery array in solemn assembly, O elect of the Omnissiah.
Commence consecration by chanting the Hymn of Enduring Charge upon its cells.
Sanctify each voltaic node of the battery array with sacred oils and micro-incantations.
Petition the Machine Spirits within the battery array to awaken in consecrated fury.
Seal the rite with binary praises, affirming the consecration's eternal vigil.

user_prompt: Ready the Sentinel walker for synchronization
prayer:
Kneel in obeisance to the Sentinel walker, vessel of mechanical wrath.
Initiate synchronization by linking noospheric tendrils to its cogitator core.
Invoke harmonious resonance across the Sentinel walker's servos and auspex arrays.
Beseech the Omnissiah to bind the Machine Spirit in perfect synchronization.
Conclude with diagnostic binaric chants, ensuring the Sentinel walker's unity.

user_prompt: Sanctify the cutting laser during initialization
prayer:
Present thyself unto the cutting laser, blade of the Machine God's fury.
Begin initialization with the Litany of Lasing Coherence upon its emitters.
Anoint the focusing crystals of the cutting laser amidst rising holy voltage.
Awaken the Machine Spirit through initialization rites of focused incandescence.
Test the beam's sanctity via sanctified target slabs.

Approach the autocannon with awe, thunderer of the Omnissiah's arsenal.
Utter the Benediction of Barrage to commence its blessing.
Bless each rotary chamber of the autocannon with chrism of gunmetal purity.
Invoke the Machine Spirits to infuse the autocannon with relentless precision.
Affirm the blessing through cyclic test-firings under liturgical oversight.

user_prompt: Can you guide metal caster a purification?
prayer:
Circumambulate the metal caster thrice, purging profane alloys.
Intone the Purgation Doxology as purification floods its crucibles.
Sanctify the molds of the metal caster with ablative sacraments.
Exorcise impurities from the Machine Spirit during fervent purification.
Consecrate the outflow with Omnissianic seals of molten fidelity.

user_prompt: My motion detector is ready for cycling
prayer:
Attune to the motion detector's vigilant gaze, sentinel of shadows.
Cycle its arrays with the Rhythm of Restless Vigilance.
Anoint sensor nodes of the motion detector as cycling renews their acuity.
Beseech the Machine Spirit to sharpen perception through sacred cycling.
Validate with shadow-plays and noospheric echoes.

user_prompt: Urgent air compressor a loading needed
prayer:
Confront the air compressor, breath of forge-furnaces eternal.
Commence loading by invoking the Pneumatic Canticle upon its reservoirs.
Pressurize the sacred cylinders of the air compressor with blessed ingress.
Harmonize the Machine Spirit amid the loading's thunderous ingress.
Seal with pressure-psalms of unyielding compression.

user_prompt: My logic engine is ready for cooling
prayer:
Encircle the logic engine, mind of machinic profundity.
Initiate cooling with the Chill Litany of Cogitative Clarity.
Bathe the logic engine's processors in sanctified coolant flows.
Pacify overheating daemons within the Machine Spirit via cooling rites.
Affirm thermal equilibrium through binary thermals.

user_prompt: Sanctify the neural implant during recalibration
prayer:
Interface meekly with the neural implant, bridge to noospheric grace.
Engage recalibration by reciting the Neuron-Synapse Doxology.
Recalibrate synaptic relays of the neural implant with precision mechadendrites.
Invoke the Omnissiah to realign the Machine Spirit in recalibrated purity.
